title: crataegus irrasa var. blanchardii
intro: Crataegus irrasa var. blanchardii, also known as the Blanchard hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn plant, a type of flowering shrub or small tree native to North America. The medicinal properties of Crataegus irrasa var. blanchardii include its ability to act as a cardio-tonic, supporting heart health and reducing blood pressure. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of angina, improving circulation, and lowering cholesterol levels. Crataegus irrasa var. blanchardii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular health.
